steps.title: Use the colon's setup
steps.content: The sentence says the narrator rehearsed the neighborhood's layout at night and "set challenges:" before the underlined portion. The underlined commands are examples of those imagined nighttime challenges.

steps.title: Reject literal misreadings
steps.content: A refers to the telephone number, which appears earlier and is not underlined. C treats the imagined challenge as literal directions. D shifts to the narrator's mother, who is not the focus of the underlined portion. The answer is B.
